summary: Frontend-only visual uplift verification for Dashboard + Tracker (HUD component system). All data-testids present and functional in both IT and EN; no runtime/console errors from the rewrites; stat values load; product grid renders with sparkline + badges + progress; add/delete/edit/refresh flows work; language switch clean (no raw i18n keys for new tracker.status_*/to_target/empty_title keys).

issues: Benign Recharts warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' fires once per card on initial mount because <Sparkline> is inside animated <motion.div variants={item}> whose initial state is opacity 0/y:14 (ResponsiveContainer briefly measures 0 width). Cosmetic only — chart renders correctly after animation. Suggest wrapping the ResponsiveContainer with a fixed min-width, or delaying Sparkline mount until after motion animation completes, to silence the warning.

test_results.dashboard_testids: PASS (onboarding-box, step-connect/optimize/track, stat-tracked=5, stat-builds=0, stat-chats=11, stat-saved=80, quick-advisor/builds/tracker all visible; labels render, no raw keys)
test_results.dashboard_recent_or_empty: PASS (recent products list rendered with 5 items — EmptyState+dash-add-product path exercised in prior iterations)
test_results.tracker_panels: PASS (track-url-input, track-btn, search-input, search-btn all visible)
test_results.tracker_grid: PASS (5 product-row-{id} cards render in grid; each shows price, sparkline, badges (DROPPING, MANUAL PRICE), and action buttons refresh-{id}, delete-product-{id}, edit-title-{id})
test_results.tracker_add_flow: PASS (posting https://example.com/... successfully added a 6th 'Untitled product' card; flow completed without crash — track-error not shown because backend accepted the URL as a manual entry)
test_results.tracker_empty_state: NOT DIRECTLY TESTED (account had products); code path present: EmptyState with tracker.empty_title + tracker-empty-focus CTA; focuses track-url-input on click. Code inspected in Tracker.jsx lines 225-228 — logic correct.
test_results.i18n_switch_tracker: PASS (no raw keys for tracker.eyebrow/title/status_drop/status_target/status_up/to_target/empty_title/add_url_title in both IT and EN)
test_results.console_errors: Only a benign 401 on an unauthenticated resource pre-login and Recharts width=-1 warnings from animated Sparkline mount. No React runtime errors, no CRA overlay.

action_items: (Nice-to-have) Silence Recharts 'width(-1)/height(-1)' warning — Sparkline is mounted while its motion parent is at opacity:0/y:14 so ResponsiveContainer briefly sees 0 width. Options: (a) set fixed pixel width instead of ResponsiveContainer, (b) render Sparkline conditionally after animate completes, or (c) add minWidth on the wrapper.

(Nice-to-have) Consider adding a data-testid on 'dash-add-product' also visible in populated state or on the 'See all' link, for parity — currently only exposed in the empty-state branch (works as designed).
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx and Tracker.jsx are well-scoped (115 and 240 lines). Good use of shared hud.jsx primitives (PageHeader/StatCard/EmptyState/Sparkline/Badge/SkeletonCard).
hud.jsx Sparkline uses ResponsiveContainer inside a fixed-height div — fine, but combined with framer-motion initial hidden state produces the width=-1 warning. Minor.

Tracker.remove() does not confirm before delete and does not surface backend errors (try/catch missing). If backend returns 4xx/5xx, the card will not be removed and user sees no feedback. Suggest a toast or optimistic-with-rollback.
ProductCard's Sparkline receives only 2-3 points (initial, lowest, current). Consider using historical price_history array if available for a richer chart.
Dashboard onboarding steps are always shown even after the user completes them — consider hiding once tracked_products > 0 && builds > 0.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily added one product via track-url-input (example.com) and deleted it as part of the add/delete flow test — DB net-neutral.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard + Tracker HUD uplift is stable. All data-testids from the review request are present and functional. Empty-state branch on Tracker was not runtime-tested because the admin account has existing products — the code path is correct per source inspection. Only remaining polish is the Recharts width=-1 warning caused by mounting Sparkline inside framer-motion initial-hidden state; not user-visible.
